title: Identity Preserved Vogue Porsche Sunset Automotive Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Identity Preserved Vogue Porsche Sunset Automotive Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image cinematic lifestyle portrait using uploaded woman portrait before sunset automotive editorial transformation, preserving same woman from the uploaded image in a Vogue x Porsche campaign-quality sunset automotive scene. Subject: same woman from the uploaded image keeps exact facial features, expression, hairstyle, body proportions, identity, and original styling while wearing colorful retro-inspired jacket, denim jeans, and sneakers with rich realistic fabric detail. Scene: urban desert-inspired setting beside a high-end modified vehicle surrounds the subject with warm golden-hour light, cotton-candy skies in peach, orange, and violet, distant city bokeh, palm trees, and modified-car luxury atmosphere. Composition: low-angle stance with one hand or prop reaching toward the viewer beside a high-end modified vehicle, seated on a sleek custom sports car wheel, with shallow depth of field, subtle wind in the hair, rim-lit silhouette, and dynamic editorial framing. Signature Elements: Preserved identity preserved vogue porsche sunset automotive portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Luxury automotive fashion photography, Vogue x Porsche campaign quality, ultra-realistic skin texture, HDR lighting, cinematic color grading, award-winning fashion photography, and powerful modern dreamer storytelling. Color Palette: Peach, orange, and violet sunset skies, warm golden rim light, colorful retro jacket tones, denim blues, sneaker accents, polished car reflections, and cinematic city-light bokeh. Lighting: Golden-hour key light, glowing rim light around the silhouette, HDR automotive highlights, soft skin illumination, distant bokeh sparkle, and dramatic sunset contrast. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image cinematic lifestyle portrait using uploaded fashion reference before Vogue x Porsche style lifestyle scene, preserving same adult woman with unchanged face, expression, hairstyle, and body proportions in a Vogue x Porsche campaign-quality sunset automotive scene. Subject: same adult woman with unchanged face, expression, hairstyle, and body proportions keeps exact facial features, expression, hairstyle, body proportions, identity, and original styling while wearing original retro jacket, denim, sneakers, and casual streetwear styling preserved. Scene: sunset parking overlook with modified sports car, palm trees, city lights, and dramatic pastel sky surrounds the subject with warm golden-hour light, cotton-candy skies in peach, orange, and violet, distant city bokeh, palm trees, and modified-car luxury atmosphere. Composition: balanced standing pose with clear silhouette and directional motion beside a high-end modified vehicle, seated on a sleek custom sports car wheel, with shallow depth of field, subtle wind in the hair, rim-lit silhouette, and dynamic editorial framing. Signature Elements: Preserved identity preserved vogue porsche sunset automotive portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Color Palette: Peach, orange, and violet sunset skies, warm golden rim light, colorful retro jacket tones, denim blues, sneaker accents, polished car reflections, and cinematic city-light bokeh. Lighting: Golden-hour key light, glowing rim light around the silhouette, HDR automotive highlights, soft skin illumination, distant bokeh sparkle, and dramatic sunset contrast. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
